acceptance_targets: [ch13-f001] PASS if the revised spans between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127, plus snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:216 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:220, contain at least two concrete, embodied beats (action + sensory detail + consequence) and no standalone placeholder abstractions for key stakes; FAIL if those spans still summarize edits without dramatized evidence.

[ch13-f004] PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:222 shows at least one new obstacle or irreversible decision in each major block and no more than two consecutive process-only paragraphs without external pressure; FAIL if drafting montage remains repetitive without leverage shift.

[ch13-f005] PASS if the revised line-149 paragraph contains both legal/evidentiary status and one explicit embodied or behavioral consequence tied to paternity uncertainty; FAIL if the beat remains purely abstract/clinical.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised spans between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127, plus snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:216 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:220, contain at least two concrete, embodied beats (action + sensory detail + consequence) and no standalone placeholder abstractions for key stakes; FAIL if those spans still summarize edits without dramatized evidence.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift appears in the revision montage: the chapter repeatedly labels emotional material ("Out went..." / "In came...") instead of rendering at least one fully present beat of bodily, moral, or relational consequence. At the moment the narrative claims greater honesty, it substitutes process summary for scene-level evidence.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127, and again in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:216 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:220, replace at least two abstract process lines with concrete micro-scenes from the material she is drafting (one tied to relapse cost, one tied to family lie cost). Keep evidentiary rigor, but anchor each replacement in observable action, sensation, and immediate consequence rather than categorical labels like "In came the body."

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:222 shows at least one new obstacle or irreversible decision in each major block and no more than two consecutive process-only paragraphs without external pressure; FAIL if drafting montage remains repetitive without leverage shift.
findings.problem: Mid-chapter momentum sags because two long drafting loops deliver similar function (self-editing toward honesty) before the next external consequence lands. The causal spine stays intact, but leverage does not escalate quickly enough between Luis's challenge and Cora's hard window.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress either the drafting loop bounded by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:149 or the later loop bounded by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:208 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:220, then intercut added external pressure inside that span (housing risk, interview fragility, sponsor consequence, or institutional threat) so each block forces a new choice before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:222.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line-149 paragraph contains both legal/evidentiary status and one explicit embodied or behavioral consequence tied to paternity uncertainty; FAIL if the beat remains purely abstract/clinical.
findings.problem: Timidity at a key emotional node: the paternity line resolves into clinical hedging ("emotionally disruptive", "partially verified") without adjacent lived consequence, softening what should register as immediate destabilization.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:149, keep the evidentiary uncertainty language but pair it with one concrete present-tense consequence in Marisol's body or behavior (e.g., involuntary reaction, memory intrusion, or decision shift) to restore pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
